zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron是Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron和Unknown Cameron的兒子，於1230年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。他於大約1255年與Mrs. Roberta Cameron在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1320年在他的家鄉享年90歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron是Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron和Unknown Cameron的儿子，于1230年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾。他于大约1255年与Mrs. Roberta Cameron在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1320年在他的家乡享年90岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron was born in 1230, in Inverness-shire, Scotland as the son of Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron and Unknown Cameron. He married Mrs. Roberta Cameron about 1255, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1320, in his hometown, at the age of 90, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron est né en 1230, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, fils de Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron et Unknown Cameron. Il a épousé Mrs. Roberta Cameron environ 1255, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1320, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron wurde 1230 in Inverness-shire, Scotland, als Sohn von Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron und Unknown Cameron geboren. Er hat um 1255 in Scotland Mrs. Roberta Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 90 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron è nato il nel 1230 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland come figlio di Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron e Unknown Cameron. Lui sposato Mrs. Roberta Cameron circa 1255, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1320, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameronは1230年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアでSir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan CameronとUnknown Cameronの息子として生まれた。約1255年にスコットランドでMrs. Roberta Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1320年に故郷で90歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 1230년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron(와)과 Unknown Cameron의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1255년 스컷랜드에서 Mrs. Roberta Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1320년 그의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron nasceu em 1230, em Inverness-shire, Scotland filho de Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron e Unknown Cameron. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Roberta Cameron aproximadamente 1255, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1320, em sua cidade natal, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron родился в 1230 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron и Unknown Cameron. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Roberta Cameron около 1255 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1320 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron nació en 1230, en Inverness-shire, Scotland como hijo de Sir Robert Cameron III, Sixth Chief of Clan Cameron y Unknown Cameron. Se casó con Mrs. Roberta Cameron aproximadamente 1255, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1320, en su pueblo, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
